mapper.sql: id, user_no, openid, phone, email, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, user_type, real_name, id_card_no, id_verify_status, developer_status, skill_tags, developer_role_type, id_card_front_url, id_card_back_url, selfie_url, skill_audit_status, skill_audit_reason, developer_skill_tag_ids, intro, rating, completed_order_count, status, last_login_at, version, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into `user` ( user_no, openid, phone, email, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, user_type, real_name, id_card_no, id_verify_status, developer_status, skill_tags, developer_role_type, id_card_front_url, id_card_back_url, selfie_url, skill_audit_status, skill_audit_reason, developer_skill_tag_ids, intro, rating, completed_order_count, status, last_login_at, version, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{userNo}, #{openid}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{userType}, #{realName}, #{idCardNo}, #{idVerifyStatus}, #{developerStatus}, #{skillTags}, #{developerRoleType}, #{idCardFrontUrl}, #{idCardBackUrl}, #{selfieUrl}, #{skillAuditStatus}, #{skillAuditReason}, #{developerSkillTagIds}, #{intro}, #{rating}, #{completedOrderCount}, #{status}, #{lastLoginAt}, #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: update `user` set last_login_at = now(), updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update `user` set status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}

update `user` set real_name = #{realName}, id_card_no = #{idCardNo}, developer_status = #{developerStatus}, id_verify_status = #{idVerifyStatus}, skill_tags = #{skillTags}, developer_role_type = #{developerRoleType}, id_card_front_url = #{idCardFrontUrl}, id_card_back_url = #{idCardBackUrl}, selfie_url = #{selfieUrl}, skill_audit_status = #{skillAuditStatus}, skill_audit_reason = #{skillAuditReason}, developer_skill_tag_ids = #{developerSkillTagIds}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update `user` set nickname = #{nickname}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, intro = #{intro}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update `user` set openid = #{openid}, nickname = #{nickname}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
